requirement_topic.en: ENA / PSRC Grid Connection for BESS — 50 Hz System, IEC 62933, and EAEU-Aligned Connection Requirements
requirement_topic.zh: ENA / PSRC BESS并网——50 Hz系统、IEC 62933及EAEU协调并网要求
requirement_topic.zht: ENA / PSRC BESS併網——50 Hz系統、IEC 62933及EAEU協調併網要求

summary.en: ENA (Electric Networks of Armenia) is the main electricity distribution network operator in Armenia, responsible for grid connection of distributed and utility-scale generation and storage assets. The Public Services Regulatory Commission (PSRC) is the sector regulator that sets rules for grid-connected energy installations. All grid-connected BESS installations in Armenia require PSRC-authorised technical review and ENA interconnection approval. Armenia's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V (same nominal frequency and voltage as China), which reduces the voltage-reconfiguration burden on Chinese BESS power conversion systems (PCS) compared to markets such as Qatar (240/415 V). However, PSRC and ENA define their own protection parameter specifications, communication interface requirements, and technical acceptance criteria — Chinese GB/T grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals are not transferable. Armenia is an EAEU member and EAEU Technical Regulations may impose additional requirements on in-scope BESS equipment. Where project specifications reference IEC 62933 (Electrical Energy Storage Systems) series standards including IEC 62933-2-1 and IEC 62933-5-2, BESS suppliers must prepare documentation accordingly. A publicly accessible PSRC or ENA technical specification document specifically for BESS grid connection had not been confirmed as of the dataset date; project-specific connection terms must be obtained directly from PSRC and ENA.
summary.zh: ENA（亚美尼亚电网公司）是亚美尼亚主要的配电网运营商，负责分布式及公用事业规模发电和储能资产的电网接入。公共服务监管委员会（PSRC）是行业监管机构，制定并网储能装置的规则。亚美尼亚所有并网BESS装置均须取得PSRC授权的技术审查及ENA电网接入许可。亚美尼亚电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V（与中国标称频率和电压相同），这降低了中国BESS储能变流器（PCS）相较于卡塔尔（240/415 V）等市场的电压重新配置负担。但PSRC和ENA有其自身的保护参数规格、通信接口要求和技术验收标准——中国GB/T并网证书和NEA审批不可转用。亚美尼亚是EAEU成员国，EAEU技术法规可能对范围内BESS设备提出额外要求。若项目规格引用IEC 62933（电化学储能系统）系列标准（包括IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2），BESS供应商须相应准备文件。截至本数据集日期，尚未确认PSRC或ENA公开发布专门针对BESS并网的技术规格文件；项目专属并网条款须直接向PSRC和ENA获取。
summary.zht: ENA（亞美尼亞電網公司）是亞美尼亞主要的配電網運營商，負責分布式及公用事業規模發電和儲能資產的電網接入。公共服務監管委員會（PSRC）是行業監管機構，制定併網儲能裝置的規則。亞美尼亞所有併網BESS裝置均須取得PSRC授權的技術審查及ENA電網接入許可。亞美尼亞電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V（與中國標稱頻率和電壓相同），這降低了中國BESS儲能變流器（PCS）相較於卡達（240/415 V）等市場的電壓重新配置負擔。但PSRC和ENA有其自身的保護參數規格、通訊接口要求和技術驗收標準——中國GB/T併網證書和NEA審批不可轉用。亞美尼亞是EAEU成員國，EAEU技術法規可能對範圍內BESS設備提出額外要求。若項目規格引用IEC 62933（電化學儲能系統）系列標準（包括IEC 62933-2-1和IEC 62933-5-2），BESS供應商須相應準備文件。截至本數據集日期，尚未確認PSRC或ENA公開發布專門針對BESS併網的技術規格文件；項目專屬併網條款須直接向PSRC和ENA獲取。

standards_or_laws: PSRC (Public Services Regulatory Commission of Armenia) — regulatory authority for grid-connected energy installations; technical requirements are project-specific and defined in connection agreements
ENA (Electric Networks of Armenia) — distribution network operator; interconnection approval required for all grid-connected BESS
IEC 62933-2-1:2017+AMD1:2021 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Unit Parameters and Testing Methods — General Specification (expected project-specification reference)
IEC 62933-5-2 — Electrical Energy Storage Systems — Safety Requirements — Electrochemical-based systems (expected project-specification reference)
EAEU Technical Regulations TR CU 004/2011 and TR CU 020/2011 — may impose in-scope equipment requirements; verify with SARM or an EAEU-accredited certification body

summary.en: China's grid-connection requirements for BESS are governed by GB/T 36558-2023 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems) and GB/T 34120-2023 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network). The PCS (energy storage converter) is assessed under NB/T 42090-2016 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters). Chinese BESS products are validated by grid operators through National Energy Administration (NEA)-authorised procedures. China's grid operates at 50 Hz, 220/380 V — the same nominal values as Armenia, which means no voltage level re-parameterisation is required at the grid interface level. However, PSRC and ENA protection relay settings, anti-islanding requirements, and SCADA/communication protocol specifications are independent of Chinese NEA approvals and must be met separately.
summary.zh: 中国BESS并网要求由GB/T 36558-2023（电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件）和GB/T 34120-2023（电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范）管控。储能变流器（PCS）依据NB/T 42090-2016（储能变流器检测技术规程）进行评估。中国BESS产品通过国家能源局（NEA）授权程序获得电网运营商认可。中国电网运行参数为50 Hz、220/380 V——与亚美尼亚标称值相同，意味着电网接口层面无需进行电压等级重新参数配置。但PSRC和ENA的继电保护整定值、防孤岛要求及SCADA/通信协议规格独立于中国NEA审批，须另行满足。
summary.zht: 中國BESS併網要求由GB/T 36558-2023（電力系統電化學儲能系統通用技術條件）和GB/T 34120-2023（電化學儲能系統接入配電網技術規範）管控。儲能變流器（PCS）依據NB/T 42090-2016（儲能變流器檢測技術規程）進行評估。中國BESS產品通過國家能源局（NEA）授權程序獲得電網運營商認可。中國電網運行參數為50 Hz、220/380 V——與亞美尼亞標稱值相同，意味著電網接口層面無需進行電壓等級重新參數配置。但PSRC和ENA的繼電保護整定值、防孤島要求及SCADA/通訊協議規格獨立於中國NEA審批，須另行滿足。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 36558-2023 — 电力系统电化学储能系统通用技术条件 (General Technical Requirements for Electrochemical Energy Storage Systems in Power Systems)
GB/T 34120-2023 — 电化学储能系统接入配电网技术规范 (Technical Specification for Electrochemical Energy Storage System Connected to Distribution Network)
NB/T 42090-2016 — 储能变流器检测技术规程 (Technical Code for Testing of Energy Storage Converters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection certificates and NEA approvals do not satisfy PSRC/ENA grid-connection requirements in Armenia. Key considerations: (a) grid voltage and frequency — Armenia and China share the same 50 Hz, 220/380 V nominal values, reducing voltage-reconfiguration burden; however, PSRC/ENA-specific protection relay settings, anti-islanding parameters, and ride-through thresholds must be verified and configured to Armenian specifications; (b) PSRC and ENA project-specific connection agreement terms — engage PSRC and ENA at the earliest project stage to obtain technical requirements before equipment design is finalised; (c) IEC 62933 series compliance — where project specifications require IEC 62933-2-1 or IEC 62933-5-2 evidence, prepare test and design documentation accordingly; Chinese GB/T standards are not accepted as equivalent; (d) EAEU compliance — where in-scope under EAEU TR CU 004/2011 (LVD) or TR CU 020/2011 (EMC), EAC certification from an EAEU-accredited certification body is required for the BESS equipment; Chinese GB certifications are not accepted; (e) communication protocols — confirm the SCADA/communication interface protocol required by ENA for BESS monitoring (IEC 61850, Modbus, or project-specific specification); (f) renewable integration context — Armenia's grid is experiencing solar growth and PSRC may impose specific grid-support requirements (frequency response, reactive power) for storage assets.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T BESS并网证书和NEA审批不满足亚美尼亚PSRC/ENA并网要求。主要注意事项：（a）电网电压和频率——亚美尼亚与中国共享相同的50 Hz、220/380 V标称值，降低了电压重新配置负担；但PSRC/ENA专属继电保护整定值、防孤岛参数和穿越阈值须按亚美尼亚规格核实和配置；（b）PSRC和ENA项目专属并网协议条款——在设备设计最终确定前，应在项目最早阶段与PSRC和ENA接触以获取技术要求；（c）IEC 62933系列合规——若项目规格要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2证据，须相应准备测试和设计文件；中国GB/T标准不被接受为等效依据；（d）EAEU合规——若BESS设备属于EAEU TR CU 004/2011（低压设备）或TR CU 020/2011（电磁兼容）范围，须由EAEU认可认证机构颁发EAC证书；中国GB认证不被接受；（e）通信协议——确认ENA对BESS监控所要求的SCADA/通信接口协议（IEC 61850、Modbus或项目专属规格）；（f）可再生能源并网背景——亚美尼亚电网正经历太阳能增长，PSRC可能对储能资产提出具体电网支撑要求（频率响应、无功功率）。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T BESS併網證書和NEA審批不滿足亞美尼亞PSRC/ENA併網要求。主要注意事項：（a）電網電壓和頻率——亞美尼亞與中國共享相同的50 Hz、220/380 V標稱值，降低了電壓重新配置負擔；但PSRC/ENA專屬繼電保護整定值、防孤島參數和穿越閾值須按亞美尼亞規格核實和配置；（b）PSRC和ENA項目專屬併網協議條款——在設備設計最終確定前，應在項目最早階段與PSRC和ENA接觸以獲取技術要求；（c）IEC 62933系列合規——若項目規格要求IEC 62933-2-1或IEC 62933-5-2證據，須相應準備測試和設計文件；中國GB/T標準不被接受為等效依據；（d）EAEU合規——若BESS設備屬於EAEU TR CU 004/2011（低壓設備）或TR CU 020/2011（電磁相容）範圍，須由EAEU認可認證機構頒發EAC證書；中國GB認證不被接受；（e）通訊協議——確認ENA對BESS監控所要求的SCADA/通訊接口協議（IEC 61850、Modbus或項目專屬規格）；（f）可再生能源併網背景——亞美尼亞電網正經歷太陽能增長，PSRC可能對儲能資產提出具體電網支撐要求（頻率響應、無功功率）。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — PSRC authorisation and ENA interconnection approval are required for all grid-connected BESS in Armenia; technical requirements are project-specific and must be obtained directly from PSRC and ENA
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB/T 36558 and NEA grid-operator approval procedures are mandatory for grid-connected BESS in China; not transferable to Armenia

source.publisher: Public Services Regulatory Commission of Armenia (PSRC)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T BESS grid-connection compliance and NEA approvals do not satisfy PSRC/ENA Armenia grid-connection requirements. Armenia and China share the same 50 Hz, 220/380 V nominal grid parameters, reducing voltage-level reconfiguration burden; however, PSRC/ENA protection settings, anti-islanding requirements, and SCADA/communication specifications must be met independently. Where BESS equipment is in scope under EAEU TR CU 004/2011 or TR CU 020/2011, EAC certification from an EAEU-accredited body is required — this is a genuine pathway unique to EAEU member states. Engage PSRC and ENA at the earliest project stage to determine connection agreement technical requirements, applicable IEC 62933 evidence, and SCADA/communication protocol specifications before equipment procurement is finalised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T BESS并网合规和NEA审批不满足PSRC/ENA亚美尼亚并网要求。亚美尼亚与中国共享相同的50 Hz、220/380 V标称电网参数，降低了电压等级重新配置负担；但PSRC/ENA保护整定值、防孤岛要求和SCADA/通信规格须独立满足。若BESS设备属于EAEU TR CU 004/2011或TR CU 020/2011范围，须由EAEU认可机构颁发EAC证书——这是EAEU成员国独有的真实认证路径。应在项目最早阶段与PSRC和ENA接触，在设备采购最终确定前确定并网协议技术要求、适用IEC 62933证据及SCADA/通信协议规格。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T BESS併網合規和NEA審批不滿足PSRC/ENA亞美尼亞併網要求。亞美尼亞與中國共享相同的50 Hz、220/380 V標稱電網參數，降低了電壓等級重新配置負擔；但PSRC/ENA保護整定值、防孤島要求和SCADA/通訊規格須獨立滿足。若BESS設備屬於EAEU TR CU 004/2011或TR CU 020/2011範圍，須由EAEU認可機構頒發EAC證書——這是EAEU成員國獨有的真實認證路徑。應在項目最早階段與PSRC和ENA接觸，在設備採購最終確定前確定併網協議技術要求、適用IEC 62933證據及SCADA/通訊協議規格。
